programmes.show_description: Patrol officer Nick Garruto heads off in hot pursuit of car thieves. Patrolman Matt Rugel deals with a driver who's had one too many margaritas.
Carl Andrews takes to the wheel with a gargantuan load, Russell's mobile classroom gets shaken and his engine cooked, and the Ferris's dodge raging bush fires.
Marcus Charman and Trigger patch up an HGV's fuel tank during evening rush hour. Tez resorts to using a blowtorch to fix a car transporter's snapped spring.
On one of the UK's busiest roads, a jackknifed HGV has careered through a front garden, over a ditch and is blocking a lane of traffic.

Documentary series following the crews who keep Britain moving when a big freeze strikes.
Scott and Adam discover a huge stash in the boot of a car, and a runaway dealer just misses mowing down Gary.
Scott and Dave track a pair of mobile phone thieves with the help of GPS technology. Nick pushes his motor to the limit as he pursues a criminal gang.
Western starring Edmond O'Brien and Dean Jagger. John Vickers joins Custer's cavalry regiment seeking private revenge. (1951)

An early spring thaw turns roadwork into a muddy mess for Brent and Taylor. Craig clashes with his son-in-law and the boss receives a call that could jeopardise his entire operation.
Being a Traffic Cop isn't just about booking motorists - this episode sees North Yorkshire's finest handling cases of sex offences and people trafficking.
Police follow up reports of a crossbow. Mark pursues the world's worst driver.
Nottinghamshire's finest are back with a bang as the interceptors clash with a runaway driver in one of the most epic police pursuits ever caught on camera.
At Grimsby docks, Sergeant Tom Elvidge pursues teenagers suspected of trying to steal a moped. With no time to wait for backup, a solo Tom chases after them.
...for War. We follow every moment over six gruelling months as a platoon prepares for possible frontline deployment. A Band of Brothers who would lay down their lives for each other.
Two men acting strangely in a gas station draw the suspicion of an employee. A mum calls the cops when her daughter throws water on her.
A young girl is the only witness to the death of the detective questioning her. She tells Mulder and Scully that someone else was in the room.
A young mother addicted to crack cocaine takes her daughter on a risky drug smuggling job in Venezuela, but her world collapses when the two are torn apart.
All hell breaks loose for Turbo, Christian racks up massive mileage with a huge load, and the Wise couple feel the pressure of a fuel-draining headwind.
Reality series. In a quiet rural village in Leicestershire, a utility truck has got stuck in the mud in a local resident's garden. Adam and his team have to get it out.
Near the junction to East Midlands airport, a trailer sheds its load and causes rush hour chaos. Adam dispatches a crack team of his finest recovery ops.

Observational documentary series. The high-speed pursuit specialists of Cumbria tackle a runaway knifeman, an overturned trailer full of cows and a ruptured gas main.
Duncan receives a shock when a cyclist who has been crushed and trapped under a car turns out to be someone he knows.

With the last mill shutting down, Craig shifts into overdrive; the late season push hits hard on the crew and the equipment; as breakdowns add up, driver Taylor hits his breaking point.
The Traffic Cops come up against some of the most dangerous and vicious criminals operating on their North Yorkshire patch.
An ill wind blows through Worksop tonight when a Ford Focus seemingly fails to stop for Lewis and Rich. The suspected driver is away on his toes, but police dog Quantum follows his
A Dog Unit double-feature kicks off this action-packed episode. First off, Jen and Quantum supply canine support to a major drug bust at a disused pub.
...Britain's Speeders. PCs hunt a possible cloned vehicle. After tasers are drawn, the driver gives up - but what has he got to hide? In Humberside, a man has three cars stolen.
On an epic manhunt, a police dog becomes star of the show after tracking suspects a mile away. And when interceptors wake a suspected burglar, he sinks his teeth into an officer's leg.
The night shift police of the Gloucestershire Constabulary deal with multiple car thefts, drunken misbehaviour in Cheltenham town centre, and a boy who has run off into the night...
Top scientists at an aeronautics research lab die under mysterious circumstances, with a mentally handicapped janitor the only other person around.
